tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS Community Advisory Committee Meeting #3

payload.description: Third Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project. Held at The New York Botanical Garden. Included presentation on corridor design with offset bus lanes, SBS stop location discussion, and workshop on conceptual designs at E. 167th Street, E. 204th Street, E. Tremont Avenue, Cross Bronx Expressway, and Fordham Road.
organizers: New York City Department of Transportation

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue

payload.description: Proposed offset bus lanes along Webster Avenue as the selected corridor design for SBS. Conceptual designs shown at E. 167th Street and E. 204th Street.

evidence_refs.source_quote: how the proposed corridor design – offset bus lanes - was selected
conceptual designs for offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue, at E. 167 th Street and at E. 204 th Street
